author: All-Hands-AI
description:
OpenHands is an open-source AI-powered coding assistant that provides developers with intelligent code completion, generation, and debugging capabilities. It runs in a sandboxed environment to ensure security and isolation while allowing access to various development tools and resources.

**Key Features:**
- AI-powered code completion and generation
- Interactive debugging and error resolution
- Support for multiple programming languages
- Secure sandboxed execution environment
- Customizable runtime configurations
- Integration with Docker for containerized workflows

**Learn More:**
- [OpenHands Official Website](https://www.all-hands.dev)
- [OpenHands GitHub Repository](https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands)
- [Documentation](https://docs.all-hands.dev)

releaseNotes.en_US:
- 0.59.0 adds support for the Lemonade Provider.
- Repository search, mounted-volume file ownership, prompt box resizing, and multiple UI issues were fixed.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- 0.59.0 adds support for the Lemonade Provider.
- Repository search, mounted-volume file ownership, prompt box resizing, and multiple UI issues were fixed.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- 0.59.0 aggiunge il supporto per Lemonade Provider.
- Sono stati risolti i problemi relativi alla ricerca nel repository, alla proprietà dei file mounted-volume, al ridimensionamento della casella di messaggio e a diversi problemi relativi a UI.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- 0.59.0 legger til støtte for Lemonade-leverandøren.
- Repository-søk, mounted-volume-fileierskap, endring av størrelse på ledetekster og flere UI-problemer ble løst.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- 0.59.0 增加了 Lemonade Provider 支持。
- 修复了仓库搜索、挂载卷文件所有权、提示框调整大小以及多个 UI 问题。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- 0.59.0 は Lemonade Provider のサポートを追加します。
- リポジトリ検索、マウントボリュームのファイル所有権、プロンプトボックスのリサイズ、複数の UI 問題が修正されました。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- 0.59.0은 Lemonade Provider 지원을 추가합니다.
- 저장소 검색, 마운트된 볼륨 파일 소유권, 프롬프트 상자 크기 조정, 여러 UI 문제가 수정되었습니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- 0.59.0 ajoute la prise en charge du Lemonade Provider.
- La recherche de dépôts, la propriété des fichiers des volumes montés, le redimensionnement de la zone de prompt et plusieurs problèmes d'interface ont été corrigés.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- 0.59.0 fügt Unterstützung für den Lemonade Provider hinzu.
- Repository-Suche, Dateibesitz von eingebundenen Volumes, Größenänderung des Prompt-Felds und mehrere UI-Probleme wurden behoben.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- 0.59.0 lägger till stöd för Lemonade Provider.
- Förvarssökning, ägande av mounted-volume-filer, storleksändring av promptrutan och flera UI-problem fixades.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το 0.59.0 προσθέτει υποστήριξη για τον πάροχο λεμονάδας.
- Διορθώθηκαν η αναζήτηση αποθετηρίου, η ιδιοκτησία αρχείου mounted-volume, η αλλαγή μεγέθους του πλαισίου προτροπής και πολλά προβλήματα UI.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- 0.59.0 dodaje podršku za Lemonade Provider.
- Ispravljeno je pretraživanje repozitorija, vlasništvo datoteke mounted-volume, promjena veličine okvira s upitom i više problema s UI.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- 0.59.0 adiciona suporte para o Lemonade Provider.
- A pesquisa de repositório, a propriedade do ficheiro mounted-volume, o redimensionamento da caixa de prompt e vários problemas de UI foram corrigidos.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- 0.59.0 добавляет поддержку поставщика лимонада.
- Исправлены поиск в репозитории, владение файлом mounted-volume, изменение размера поля подсказки и многочисленные проблемы UI.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- 0.59.0 Limonata Sağlayıcısı için destek ekler.
- Depo araması, mounted-volume dosya sahipliği, bilgi istemi kutusunun yeniden boyutlandırılması ve birden fazla UI sorunu düzeltildi.

title: OpenHands
